text_block_list.name: Palmer's Friend
text_block_list.text:
Phew! Thanks, Palmer! I knew coming to you about this was the smart
move.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah? Don't think I did too much, but I'm always down to at least
lend an ear!

text_block_list.name: Palmer's Friend
text_block_list.text: Waaah, you're just too sweet! I'm totally jealous of your trainer!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! And why's that? Don't you mean that you're jealous of me for havin' such a good trainer?

text_block_list.name: Palmer's Friend
text_block_list.text:
No, like you always listen and give helpful advice, right? I'm jealous
of the one who's always by your side!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Eh? That so?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: (She's jealous of my trainer, huh?)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(She really does have it mixed up, though. Trainer's the one listening
and giving helpful advice to me.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
This feels totally different from all those official races... So this is
freestyle...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Incredible... Like, just watching 'em gets me so pumped!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(If Trainer hadn't pushed me to participate that day, I would've just
gone home after watching.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
...!
Yeah... Yeah, think I do!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(The only reason I'm having so much fun running these days is
because of what Trainer has given me.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
No need to feel jealous. I'm just happy I've got such a great trainer to
guide me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Really, all I can do is simply lend an ear.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've spent the day scouring some local bookstores for anything that
may prove useful for our training. And on the way home...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! What're the chances? Were you out shopping? Let's head
back together!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Holy crap, though, that's a lotta stuff! C'mon, pass it over! Your hands
are already so red!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Don't you even think about it. Wait, are those all books? Was none of
this in the library?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain that while the academy library is indeed well stocked with
useful books, there are some titles you have to make your way to a
bookstore for.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even something seemingly unrelated at first glance can be beneficial
with creative application.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: So that's why you've bought so many?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(Trainer really is the serious type. I've rarely seen anyone work so
hard... Or be so sincere about the outcome...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(That sense of self and purpose... No matter what anyone else says, it
doesn't get in the way...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: (Compared to then...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Wow, now that was a huge sigh.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Haha! My bad, my bad! Did I scare ya? I was just catchin' some Z's
over there in the shade, so I couldn't help but notice.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
And it's so over, you say? Wanna chat about the impending calamity?
I bet just talkin' about it will take a load off.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(Back then, Trainer seemed so depressed about missing some good
scouting opportunities.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(But now that I've entered the picture, Trainer's really made an effort
to get us results.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Thanks for everything, Trainer. Yours is a pretty tough job, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She runs with everything she's got, pushes through any pain and
laughs as if she's having fun the whole time. I tell her I wouldn't give
up this fun for the world.
choice_data_list: I'm glad I got to be your trainer, Palmer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I should be the one telling you how glad I am! Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Still, you shouldn't be pushing yourself quite like this. And are you
eating well? Getting enough rest?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Hahaha, well alrighty then!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: (Those bags under your eyes, though...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: (I get that we're genuinely having fun here, but...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: (Hmm... I wonder. Is there something more I could be saying to help?)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
("I'm glad I got to be your trainer, Palmer." I get that. No cap
detected.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: (But something feels off... Hmm?)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Oh, uhhh! Let's get going, yeah? I'm kinda starving!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(Okay! For now, I'll just play it cool and try not to be a bother. I can
definitely find a way to help! Yup!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer nimbly snatches a few bags from my hand and quickly
skips ahead. She smiles back at me when I thank her, and she matches
my pace once again.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
So hey, what kind of books did you get? If there's anything I can do
to help out with training prep, make sure you let me know!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her I will, but in truth, all she needs to do is simply be Mejiro
Palmer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In order to always see her run like the wind and smile, I decide that I
have to work even harder.
